/opt/homebrew/bin/cmake -E rm -f CMakeFiles/DNB.dir/objects.a
/opt/homebrew/bin/x86_64-w64-mingw32-ar qc CMakeFiles/DNB.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles/DNB.dir/objects1.rsp
/opt/homebrew/bin/x86_64-w64-mingw32-g++  -static-libgcc -static-libstdc++ -O3 -DNDEBUG  -Wl,--enable-stdcall-fixup -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles/DNB.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o DNB.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libDNB.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles/DNB.dir/linkLibs.rsp
